title: Nether Beast
content:
Netherworld Beast
 is a Beast that is known to be timid of everything in the world but possesses the power to swallow star systems and 3rd Step Cultivators easily. 
Wang Lin
 seals it as his life essence beast for his 
Ancient God
 body.

“This fierce beast was like a whale, and it was millions of feet long. Cultivators were like ants before it!

Nether Beast!

On the sides its mouth were two large whiskers that slowly wobbled. Its mouth and eyes were closed as if it was asleep.

Its body was completely dark blue. From afar it looked like a dark blue sea floating through the fog! A powerful pressure came from its body and pushed the fog apart.”

Personality
[
]

They have a Timid nature that makes them afraid of everything, even if it is weaker. They don't really have a great mind, they live their life in a dazed state of mind.

Background
[
]

Nether Beast is the Strongest Beast in the world because of their strong body and 2 innate spells, Ethereal Spell and Devour Spell.

Their aura helps them stop other living beings from coming close to them and even a 
Ji Qiong
, the King of Fierce Beast, are afraid of them.

Their strength comes from their inner realm where the time flows differently from outside. There was an adult Nether Beast chased to a corner and was forced to Devour a Star System with a time flow of 100 million years to kill all his pursuer.
